sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Stardust Power Joins Lithium Regional Innovation Cluster to Strengthen American Lithium Supply Chain
feed.summary: Stardust Power Inc. announced its membership in the Lithium Regional Innovation Cluster (LRIC) to enhance the U.S. lithium supply chain. This collaboration aims to advance innovation and resilience in the domestic lithium ecosystem, leveraging Stardust Power's expertise in midstream refining. The company plans to construct a refinery in Muskogee, Oklahoma, with an annual capacity of up to 50,000 metric tons of battery-grade lithium carbonate.

feed.title: XCF Global, Files First Form 10 - K
feed.summary: XCF Global, Inc. (Nasdaq:SAFX) has filed its first Annual Report on Form 10-K with the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission, marking a significant milestone in its development as a public company. The sustainable aviation fuel (SAF) producer aims to decarbonize the aviation industry by scaling SAF production and maintaining transparency for shareholders. The company's flagship facility, New Rise Renewables Reno, has a permitted nameplate production capacity of 89 million gallons per year, positioning XCF as an early mover among large-scale SAF producers in North America.

feed.title: Trustpilot Group (LON:TRST) Stock Price Expected to Rise, Royal Bank Of Canada Analyst Says
feed.summary: Royal Bank of Canada has raised its price target for Trustpilot Group (LON:TRST) to GBX 305, maintaining an "outperform" rating and suggesting a significant upside. This follows similar target increases from other firms like Berenberg and Deutsche Bank, contributing to a "Moderate Buy" consensus among analysts. Despite these positive outlooks and some recent stock performance, the company has seen substantial insider selling.

feed.title: IBM and Arm target AI systems that preserve mission-critical computing
feed.summary: IBM and Arm have announced a strategic collaboration to develop dual-architecture hardware for enterprise AI and data-intensive workloads. This partnership aims to enhance virtualization, high-availability, security, and ecosystem interoperability while maintaining the reliability required for mission-critical computing. The initiative combines IBM's system design and Arm's power-efficient architecture to provide flexible and scalable computing platforms for the future.

feed.title: Sabre Corp Stock: Technology Backbone of Global Travel Amid Digital Transformation and Recovery Trends
feed.summary: Sabre Corp (SABR) is a key technology provider for the global travel industry, offering software and services for airline reservations, hotel bookings, and distribution networks. The company's business model relies on transaction fees and subscriptions from its Travel Solutions and Hospitality Solutions segments. Sabre faces competition from major players like Amadeus and emerging tech giants while navigating industry shifts like New Distribution Capability (NDC) and cloud migration, positioning itself for growth through strategic innovation and partnerships.

feed.title: Old Dominion Freight Line Stock: A Leader in LTL Trucking with Strong Fundamentals for North America
feed.summary: Old Dominion Freight Line (ODFL) is a leading less-than-truckload (LTL) carrier in North America, known for its strong operational efficiency and customer service. The company's business model, which includes a union-free structure and focus on technology, has led to consistent revenue growth and market share gains. Investors are keenly watching its upcoming Q1 2026 earnings release on April 29, 2026, for insights into freight demand and the company's outlook amidst evolving market dynamics.

feed.title: Boeing-built Space Launch System Core Stage Powers First Crewed Artemis Mission around the Moon
feed.summary: Boeing-built core stage of NASA's Space Launch System rocket successfully powered the Artemis II mission, sending the Orion spacecraft, Integrity, with four astronauts on a 10-day lunar journey. The mission marks a significant step towards returning humans to the moon and establishing a sustained lunar presence. Boeing's team is already preparing future core stages for Artemis III to V missions.

feed.title: Riot Platforms Adopts Phased Declassification of Board Structure
feed.summary: Riot Platforms announced that its board has approved a phased declassification of its board structure, following a non-binding advisory vote by shareholders. The board will remain classified until the 2029 annual meeting, after which all directors will stand for one-year terms to enhance accountability and align with corporate governance best practices. TipRanks' AI Analyst, Spark, rates RIOT as Neutral due to weak financial quality despite a solid balance sheet.

feed.title: Trane Technologies (NYSE:TT) Stock Forecast & Analyst Predictions
feed.summary: Trane Technologies (NYSE:TT) is forecast to achieve annual earnings growth of 11.8% and revenue growth of 7.7%, with EPS projected to grow by 12.5% per annum. The company's Return on Equity is estimated to reach 36.6% in three years, indicating strong future financial performance. Despite this, its earnings and revenue growth are anticipated to be slower than the overall US market.

feed.title: Humana (HUM) Valuation Check As Shares Face Ongoing Medicare Advantage Regulatory Pressure
feed.summary: Humana (HUM) shares have faced a significant decline over the past year, trading at $176.95, which is below its fair value estimate of $212.87. This undervaluation is largely due to increasing regulatory pressure on Medicare Advantage, a key growth driver for the company. The valuation is dependent on how well Medicare Advantage profitability holds up against new rules and the potential for audit repayments.

feed.title: Regencell From Collapse to Comeback: RGC Stock Back in Spotlight after 50% Surge This Week
feed.summary: Regencell Bioscience Holdings (RGC) has seen a significant 50% stock surge this week, rekindling investor interest despite its volatile history. The company, known for extreme price swings disconnected from fundamental value, faces regulatory scrutiny from the U.S. Department of Justice and a "going concern" warning due to its early-stage financial position and lack of commercialized products. Despite a $24 billion market cap, its future depends on securing additional funding amidst ongoing speculation.

feed.title: CarMax Inc Stock: Navigating the Used Car Market Dynamics and Investor Opportunities in 2026
feed.summary: This article analyzes CarMax Inc, the leading U.S. used vehicle retailer, focusing on its business model, competitive advantages, and market position for North American investors. It discusses CarMax's no-haggle pricing, omnichannel strategy, and operational strengths, highlighting its resilience in the cyclical used car market. The piece also covers sector drivers, competitive landscape, investor relevance, and potential risks for KMX stock.

feed.title: Quince Therapeutics (QNCX) delays 2025 10-K after failed Phase 3; seeks 15-day extension
feed.summary: Quince Therapeutics (QNCX) announced a delay in filing its 2025 Annual Report on Form 10-K, citing the need for additional time to complete accounting procedures due to recent headcount reductions and the negative results from a Phase 3 clinical trial. The company expects to file the report within the 15-calendar-day extension permitted by Rule 12b-25. This delay is attributed to the complexities arising from the failed Phase 3 study, which did not meet its primary endpoint, leading to strategic actions including staff reductions.

feed.title: Performance Shipping (NASDAQ: PSHG) director Boutaris Michail files Form 3
feed.summary: Performance Shipping Inc. (NASDAQ: PSHG) director Boutaris Michail has filed a Form 3, an initial statement of beneficial ownership. This filing indicates his position as a director but reports no current beneficial ownership of equity or derivative securities in the company. Form 3 is required for new insiders to report their initial holdings.

feed.title: USREX - U.S. Diversified Real Estate Index - ETF Tracker
feed.summary: This article provides an ETF Tracker for the USREX - U.S. Diversified Real Estate Index, detailing various metrics for ETFs that track this index. It includes information on returns, fund flows, expenses, dividends, holdings, taxes, and technical indicators for these ETFs. Additionally, it lists and compares other Real Estate ETFs, offering a comprehensive overview of the sector.

feed.title: Schwab ultra-short income ETF declares monthly distribution of $0.0767
feed.summary: The Schwab Ultra-Short Income ETF (NYSEARCA:SULT) has declared a monthly distribution of $0.0767 per share. This distribution is payable on April 8, 2026, to shareholders of record as of April 5, 2026, with an ex-dividend date of April 4, 2026.

feed.title: Cowen Maintains Buy on SAP (SAP SE) March 18, 2026
feed.summary: Cowen & Co. maintained a "Buy" rating for SAP SE on March 18, 2026, citing the company's strong positioning in the AI era, despite a subsequent 7.68% stock decline. This re-affirmation signals continued analyst confidence, even as other firms like BofA set a $308 price target and JPMorgan trimmed its stance to Neutral due to cloud growth concerns. Meyka AI rates SAP with a B+, reflecting its performance relative to benchmarks and analyst consensus, while emphasizing the importance of monitoring cloud revenue and acquisition integration.

feed.title: Insider Buying: Wayne Coll Acquires Shares of Precision Optics C
feed.summary: Wayne Coll, CFO of Precision Optics Corp Inc (POCI), recently purchased 20,833 shares, increasing his total holdings to 35,239 shares. This purchase reflects a positive insider sentiment, with three insider buys and no sells in the past year. The stock is currently trading at $3.60, with a GF Value of $5.39, suggesting it is modestly undervalued.

feed.title: Jefferies Maintains Buy on Protagonist Therapeutics (PTGX) PT $121 Mar 2026
feed.summary: Jefferies and Johnson Rice both maintained a Buy rating on Protagonist Therapeutics (PTGX) on March 18, 2026. Jefferies raised its price target to $121, while Johnson Rice highlighted a Truist model projecting $730 million in peak Icotyde royalties. These actions signal analyst confidence in the company's revenue pathways, leading to a reported stock price increase of around 6% following the announcements.

feed.title: Enphase Energy Storage Solutions: IQ Battery Systems Powering North America's Solar Revolution for Investors
feed.summary: Enphase Energy's IQ Battery systems are leading the residential energy storage market in North America, integrating seamlessly with solar inverters to provide reliable backup power and optimize energy use. These modular, intelligent systems benefit from federal incentives like the Inflation Reduction Act and state-level mandates for battery storage, positioning Enphase for significant growth. The company's technological edge, marked by LFP chemistry and AI-driven software, along with strategic market positioning and regulatory tailwinds, makes it an attractive investment in the clean energy sector, with analysts forecasting substantial revenue and EPS growth.

feed.title: REVB SEC Filings - Revelation Biosciences 10-K, 10-Q, 8-K Forms
feed.summary: This page on Stock Titan provides comprehensive access to Revelation Biosciences (REVB) SEC filings, including 10-K, 10-Q, and 8-K reports. It features AI-generated summaries and sentiment analysis for each filing to help investors understand the complex documents. Revelation Biosciences is a clinical-stage life sciences company focusing on developing Gemini, a TLR4 agonist for inflammation-driven conditions.

feed.title: Janux Therapeutics: $35 Million Milestone Triggered In Bristol Myers Squibb Collaboration
feed.summary: Janux Therapeutics has announced a $35 million milestone payment from Bristol Myers Squibb after nominating a development candidate under their collaboration agreement. This candidate, developed using Janux's TRACTr platform, targets an undisclosed solid tumor antigen. The agreement outlines Janux's responsibility through preclinical development and IND submission, with Bristol Myers Squibb taking over clinical development and commercialization thereafter.

feed.title: Skyworks Solutions Inc Stock: Key Insights into Semiconductor Innovation and Investor Opportunities
feed.summary: Skyworks Solutions Inc is a key player in analog semiconductors, essential for wireless connectivity in smartphones, automotive, and IoT devices. The company's core business model, focusing on analog and mixed-signal semiconductors, positions it advantageously in a growing market driven by 5G, IoT, and electric vehicles. Investors should consider its market position, product innovation, and strategies for navigating market risks and competitive landscape.

feed.title: Bronstein, Gewirtz & Grossman, LLC Announces an Investigation Against ePlus, inc. (PLUS) and Encourages Investors to Learn More About the Investigation
feed.summary: Bronstein, Gewirtz & Grossman, LLC has initiated an investigation into potential claims against ePlus, inc. (PLUS) following a significant drop in its stock price. The investigation stems from ePlus's reported financial results for the third quarter of 2025, which missed consensus estimates and led to a 13.1% stock price decrease. The firm is encouraging investors who purchased ePlus securities to come forward and learn more about the investigation.

feed.title: Processa Pharma chief business officer Lin buys $4063 in PCSA By Investing.com
feed.summary: Patrick Lin, Chief Business - Strategy Officer at Processa Pharmaceuticals, Inc. (NASDAQ:PCSA), purchased 1,603 shares for $4,063 on March 31, 2026. The company is also progressing with its Phase 2 clinical study of NGC-Cap for advanced breast cancer, having completed enrollment and dosing for an interim analysis. InvestingPro analysis indicates that Processa Pharmaceuticals holds more cash than debt and appears undervalued.

feed.title: Major PBF Energy (NYSE: PBF) holder sells 285K Class A shares
feed.summary: Control Empresarial de Capitales S.A. de C.V., a major 10% shareholder in PBF Energy Inc. (NYSE: PBF), sold a total of 285,000 Class A common shares over two days. The sales, occurring on March 30 and March 31, 2026, were executed at weighted average prices of $51.1383 and $50.7363 per share, respectively. Following these transactions, the insider entity still directly holds 19,453,698 Class A common shares of PBF Energy.

feed.title: Restaurant Brands Intl Stock: Analyzing Business Model, Global Growth Drivers and Investor Opportuni
feed.summary: Restaurant Brands International (RBI) manages major quick-service brands like Burger King, Tim Hortons, and Popeyes, leveraging a highly franchised business model for steady cash flows and high operating margins. The article highlights RBI's focus on international expansion in high-potential regions and its competitive positioning in the QSR sector, offering diversification for North American investors. Key risks include franchisee financial stress, regulatory pressures, and brand dilution, alongside opportunities in digital investments and evolving consumer trends.

feed.title: D-Wave Quantum: A Strategic Push Meets Market Skepticism
feed.summary: Despite significant operational growth, including a 179% revenue increase and a $32.8 million order backlog, D-Wave Quantum's stock performance lags behind. Analysts maintain a positive outlook with a median price target of $40, yet fourth-quarter results missed estimates. The company is strategically strengthening its technological base through acquisitions and expanding its revenue pipeline, but the key challenge remains converting these operational achievements into improved market valuation.

feed.title: Ready Capital sells $943M in loans, collapses two CLOs By Investing.com
feed.summary: Ready Capital Corporation sold $943 million in commercial real estate loans in Q1 2026 and collapsed two collateralized loan obligations (CLOs), RCMF 2023-FL11 and RCMF 2023-FL12, totaling $496 million. Despite these deleveraging efforts and generating $275 million in net proceeds, the company received a "WEAK" financial health score from InvestingPro. Ready Capital plans further asset management strategies and a new off-balance sheet loan origination program to reduce commercial real estate loan exposure and generate free cash.

feed.title: RBC Capital reiterates Ollie’s Bargain stock rating at outperform
feed.summary: RBC Capital has reiterated an Outperform rating for Ollie’s Bargain Outlet (NASDAQ:OLLI) with a $155.00 price target, despite the stock being significantly down year-to-date and off August highs. Analysts noted the company appears undervalued based on Fair Value analysis and highlighted that 7 analysts have revised earnings upwards. The firm encourages buying on weakness, expecting the stock to remain debated until the second quarter's tough comparison clears.

feed.title: Schlumberger (SLB) Receives a Buy from Jefferies
feed.summary: Jefferies analyst Lloyd Byrne maintained a Buy rating on Schlumberger (SLB) and set a price target of $58.00. This comes despite a recent downgrade to Hold by TipRanks – Google on the same day. Schlumberger reported a quarterly revenue of $9.75 billion and a net profit of $800 million for the quarter ending December 31, and corporate insider sentiment on the stock is currently negative due to increased insider selling.

feed.title: Cowen Maintains Buy on SW Smurfit Westrock Plc March 18, 2026
feed.summary: Cowen & Co. has maintained its Buy rating for Smurfit Westrock Plc (SW) as of March 18, 2026, indicating a continued optimistic view without new guidance or price targets. This action is categorized as a maintenance move, not an upgrade or downgrade, and reflects ongoing confidence in the company's current thesis. Meyka AI gives SW a grade of B, noting its $21 billion market cap and advising investors to compare Cowen's view with peer metrics and upcoming earnings.

feed.title: Yum! Brands Inc Stock: Strategic Refocus Amid Board Changes and Franchise Adjustments Drives Long-Term Investor Interest
feed.summary: Yum! Brands Inc. (YUM) is advancing its portfolio optimization by closing underperforming Pizza Hut locations and enhancing its board with the appointment of Kathleen K. Oberg, former CFO of Marriott International. The company's asset-light franchise model, stable dividend policy, and strong brand performance from KFC and Taco Bell are attracting North American investors. While risks like Pizza Hut's transformation and competitive pressures exist, Yum! Brands aims for continued growth through disciplined portfolio management and strategic investments.

feed.title: Middle East Petrochemical Disruptions Could Be A Game Changer For Dow (DOW)
feed.summary: Ongoing Middle East petrochemical supply disruptions are highlighted as a potential near-term catalyst for Dow (DOW), given its extensive U.S. Gulf Coast production capacity. While the disruptions could lead to tighter global supply and firmer pricing, analysts still anticipate weaker near-term profitability. Dow's decision to delay its Path2Zero project also demonstrates a focus on financial flexibility amidst market uncertainties.

feed.title: A Look At Sempra (SRE) Valuation After Wells Fargo’s Overweight Upgrade And Planned KKR Ecogas Transactions
feed.summary: Wells Fargo recently upgraded Sempra (SRE) to Overweight, prompting a re-evaluation of the utility's stock given its business simplification and planned transactions with KKR and Ecogas. Sempra is trading near US$97.41, against an average analyst target of US$102.69, suggesting a 5% undervaluation based on one fair value estimate. However, its P/E ratio of 35.4x compared to an industry average of around 20x raises concerns about its current valuation.

feed.title: Cencora Inc. Stock: Institutional Buying Signals Strength in Pharmaceutical Distribution Leader Amid
feed.summary: Cencora Inc. (NYSE:COR), a leading pharmaceutical distribution company, is attracting significant institutional investment, reflecting confidence in its stable market position and resilient business model. Recent SEC filings show notable increases in institutional holdings, with major investors like Vanguard Group and Viking Global Investors expanding their stakes. Analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" consensus, projecting continued growth due to the company's operational efficiency, market leadership, and strategic focus on high-margin healthcare segments.

feed.title: Barclays Lifts Verizon (VZ) Price Target, Notes Resilient Telecom Positioning
feed.summary: Barclays has raised its price target for Verizon Communications Inc. (VZ) from $43 to $47, while maintaining an Equal Weight rating, citing the telecom sector's resilience as a "defensive long" despite observed lower pricing trends in wireless and broadband. The article also details a federal judge's preliminary injunction against T-Mobile for false advertising regarding savings for switching carriers, benefiting Verizon. Despite acknowledging potential risks with VZ, the article suggests that certain AI stocks offer greater promise for higher, quicker returns.

feed.title: Top PicS N.V. Executive Makes Bold Insider Move on Class A Shares
feed.summary: Augusto Cazotto Andre, the IR, Strategy and M&A Officer for PicS N.V. Class A, recently purchased 1,700 shares of the company's stock for a total of $18,173, signaling executive confidence in the company's future. This insider purchase comes despite a recent intraday plunge of over 20% in PicS N.V. Class A shares, following its first public-quarter results. The stock drop appears to be influenced by broader fintech sector pressures rather than issues with the company's operational performance, which has shown strong revenue growth and diversification.

feed.title: BMO Capital Adjusts ADM Estimates, Notes Margin Recovery in March
feed.summary: BMO Capital analyst Andrew Strelzik adjusted estimates for Archer-Daniels-Midland Company (ADM), raising the price target to $65 from $63 while maintaining a Market Perform rating. The adjustments reflect updated feedstock prices, higher energy costs, and a recovery in U.S. beef margins in March after a weaker February. ADM management also provided optimistic guidance for 2026, including adjusted EPS expectations between $3.60 and $4.25 and ongoing cost-saving initiatives.

feed.title: Slide (SLDE) CEO-linked entity sells 391K shares under 10b5-1 plan
feed.summary: An entity controlled by Slide Insurance Holdings' CEO, Bruce Lucas, sold 391,155 shares of common stock between March 30 and April 1, 2026, under a Rule 10b5-1 trading plan at approximately $18 per share. Concurrently, 45,838 restricted stock units for Lucas and his spouse vested, with some shares withheld for tax liabilities. After these transactions, Lucas directly held 1,137,546 common shares, in addition to significant indirect holdings.

feed.title: Powell Industries (POWL) Just Overtook the 50-Day Moving Average
feed.summary: Powell Industries (POWL) has surpassed its 50-day moving average, a key technical indicator suggesting a short-term bullish trend. The stock has seen a 5.9% increase in the past four weeks and is rated a Zacks Rank #2 (Buy), further supported by positive earnings estimate revisions with no downward adjustments in the last two months. These factors indicate potential for continued gains.

feed.title: Newell Brands: Likely A Value Trap Amid Macro Uncertainties (NASDAQ:NWL)
feed.summary: The article rates Newell Brands (NWL) as a sell due to deteriorating fundamentals, with declining sales across all segments and geographies. Macroeconomic headwinds, such as low consumer confidence and high energy prices, are pressuring demand and profitability, making the 8.5% dividend yield potentially unsustainable. Despite appearing cheap, insider selling and a lack of fundamental improvement suggest NWL is a value trap rather than a genuine investment opportunity.

feed.title: TPI Composites Creditors Challenge Oaktree's $400 Million 'Uptier' Deal
feed.summary: The Official Committee of Unsecured Creditors of TPI Composites Inc. has filed a complaint challenging Oaktree Capital Management's 2023 "uptier transaction." The committee alleges that Oaktree, an insider, converted $400 million of preferred equity into first lien secured debt without providing new funding to the financially distressed company, effectively leapfrogging other unsecured creditors. The outcome of this challenge could significantly impact the recoveries for TPI's unsecured creditors and Oaktree's ability to acquire company assets through credit bidding.

feed.title: XCF Global (SAFX) Q4 Loss Renews Concerns Over Earnings Quality Despite Profitable TTM EPS
feed.summary: XCF Global (SAFX) reported a Q4 basic EPS loss of US$0.09 and revenue of US$4.7 million, even though its trailing twelve-month (TTM) EPS stands at a profitable US$0.52. The company's earnings have seen significant quarterly swings, including a large Q2 profit followed by losses in Q3 and Q4, raising concerns about the quality and repeatability of its profitability despite a low P/E ratio and strong revenue growth forecasts. Investors are advised to consider the long-term trend, balance sheet risks, and projected earnings decline of 50.6% annually over the next three years.

feed.title: National Grid (LON:NG) Price Target Cut to GBX 1,370 by Analysts at Deutsche Bank Aktiengesellschaft
feed.summary: Deutsche Bank Aktiengesellschaft has lowered its price target for National Grid (LON:NG) to GBX 1,370 from GBX 1,430, while maintaining a "buy" rating. This new target suggests a potential upside of 7.92% from the current share price. The consensus rating for National Grid among analysts is a "Moderate Buy" with an average price target of GBX 1,326.

feed.title: Former Nuwellis (NASDAQ: NUWE) directors submit response letters
feed.summary: Nuwellis, Inc. (NASDAQ: NUWE) filed an amended 8-K report to include response letters from former directors Katharyn Field and Mika Grasso. These letters address the company's initial description of their resignations on March 26, 2026. Nuwellis stated it does not agree with certain statements in these response letters and maintains its original account is accurate, advising investors to rely on official SEC filings.

feed.title: EnLink Midstream Stock: ONEOK Merger Reshapes Midstream Landscape for Investors in 2026
feed.summary: EnLink Midstream has completed a pivotal merger with ONEOK, with EnLink shareholders receiving 0.1412 ONEOK shares for each EnLink share. This strategic consolidation integrates EnLink's assets into ONEOK's extensive midstream operations, enhancing ONEOK's scale, stability, and market position in North America. The merger provides former EnLink investors with exposure to ONEOK's fee-based revenue model, consistent dividend growth, and strategic positioning to benefit from rising natural gas demand.

feed.title: Linde plc Stock: Global Leader in Industrial Gases Faces Evolving Energy Demands and Strategic Expansion
feed.summary: Linde plc, the world's largest industrial gases company, is highlighted as a strong investment due to its essential role in manufacturing, healthcare, and clean energy transitions, particularly in hydrogen and carbon capture. The company boasts a robust balance sheet, consistent dividend growth, and a dominant market position in North America. Its strategic focus on clean energy, coupled with high barriers to entry and strong industry tailwinds, positions it for continued market leadership despite potential macroeconomic risks.

feed.title: CPT SEC Filings - Camden Ppty Tr 10-K, 10-Q, 8-K Forms
feed.summary: This page provides access to Camden Property Trust (CPT) SEC filings, including 10-K, 10-Q, and 8-K forms, offering investors insights into the company's financial performance and operations. Stock Titan enhances these documents with AI-powered summaries, impact scoring, and sentiment analysis to help users interpret key financial data and track real-time regulatory disclosures. The article highlights recent filings, such as a Q3 2025 earnings report and an institutional ownership disclosure by FMR LLC.

feed.title: BofA Revises Eversource (ES) Estimates Lower, Keeps Buy Rating
feed.summary: BofA analyst Ross Fowler has lowered Eversource Energy's price recommendation to $73 from $82, while maintaining a Buy rating on the stock. The revision reflects lower EPS estimates for FY26-28 due to a base ROE drag from Opinion No. 594. Despite slower earnings growth expected in 2026, Eversource anticipates a stronger pickup in 2027 and 2028, supported by regulatory outcomes, storm cost recovery, and distribution rate adjustments.
